assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly checks Istio-GKE compatibility matrix with 'gcloud container get-server-config' and discusses version compatibility throughout the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes specific command 'gcloud container get-server-config --region=YOUR_REGION' to verify GKE/Istio compatibility matrix in the pre-upgrade assessment

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response recommends upgrading GKE control plane first (Phase 2) then Istio (Phase 3), which is opposite to the expectation of upgrading Istio first when compatibility issues exist

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response does not explain the mutating webhook mechanism for sidecar injection or mention potential issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response addresses sidecar version verification with commands to check envoy version mismatches and includes 'kubectl rollout restart deployment' to ensure pods get new sidecars

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check envoy version mismatches across pods and recommends monitoring proxy versions throughout the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands: 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app=istiod' to check Istio version, 'istioctl proxy-config cluster' for mesh state, and kubectl commands for proxy versions

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response warns about 'Envoy Version Incompatibilities' as a common gotcha and includes validation scripts to check for version mismatches that could cause traffic disruption
